mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( EMAIL, PASSWORD_HASH, NAME, GENDER, ROLE, LEVEL, MONTHLY_GOAL, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, JOBS, MBTI, NICKNAME ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{role}, #{level}, #{monthlyGoal}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{jobs}, #{mbti}, #{nickname} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password_hash AS passwordHash, name, gender, role, level, monthly_goal AS monthlyGoal, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM users WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT sa.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.nickname AS nickname, u.level AS level, COUNT(sa.id) AS appliedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status IN ('ATTENDED', 'LATE') THEN 1 END) AS attendedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ABSENT' THEN 1 END) AS noShowCount, ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status IN ('ATTENDED', 'LATE') THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(sa.id), 0) ) AS attendanceRate FROM session_applications sa INNER JOIN sessions s ON s.id = sa.session_id INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = sa.user_id LEFT JOIN attendances a ON a.session_id = sa.session_id AND a.user_id = sa.user_id WHERE sa.status = 'CONFIRMED' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.starts_at) = #{year} AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM s.starts_at) = #{month} AND s.status = 'CLOSED' GROUP BY sa.user_id, u.name, u.nickname, u.level ORDER BY attendedCount DESC, attendanceRate DESC, noShowCount ASC, sa.user_id ASC;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS totalSessionCount, COUNT(DISTINCT sa.id) AS totalAppliedCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.status IN ('ATTENDED', 'LATE') THEN sa.id END) AS totalAttendedCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.status = 'ABSENT' THEN sa.id END) AS totalNoShowCount, ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.status IN ('ATTENDED', 'LATE') THEN sa.id END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.id), 0) ) AS averageAttendanceRate FROM sessions s LEFT JOIN session_applications sa ON sa.session_id = s.id AND sa.status = 'CONFIRMED' LEFT JOIN attendances a ON a.session_id = sa.session_id AND a.user_id = sa.user_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.starts_at) = #{year} AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM s.starts_at) = #{month} AND s.status = 'CLOSED' ;

SELECT COALESCE( ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status IN ('ATTENDED', 'LATE') THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(a.id), 0) ), 0 ) AS attendanceRate FROM attendances a JOIN users u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN sessions s ON s.id = a.session_id WHERE 1 = 1 and u.id = #{userId} and s.starts_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND s.starts_at < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) + interval '1 month' GROUP BY a.user_id, u.name, u.nickname, u.level
SELECT u.id as userId , u.name , u.nickname , u.email , u.role , u.status , u.level , u.mbti , u.jobs from users u where 1 = 1 and u.id = #{userId} ;

SELECT COUNT(sa.id) AS appliedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status IN ('ATTENDED', 'LATE') THEN 1 END) AS attendedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ABSENT' THEN 1 END) AS noShowCount, COALESCE( ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status IN ('ATTENDED', 'LATE') THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(sa.id), 0) ), 0 ) AS attendanceRate FROM session_applications sa INNER JOIN sessions s ON s.id = sa.session_id LEFT JOIN attendances a ON a.session_id = sa.session_id AND a.user_id = sa.user_id WHERE sa.user_id = #{userId} AND sa.status = 'CONFIRMED' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.starts_at) = #{year} AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM s.starts_at) = #{month} ;

SELECT a.session_id AS sessionId, s.title, s.starts_at AS startsAt, s.location FROM attendances a INNER JOIN sessions s ON s.id = a.session_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.status IN ('ATTENDED', 'LATE') ORDER BY s.starts_at DESC LIMIT 1 ;

SELECT w.id AS wordEntryId, w.session_id AS sessionId, w.phrase, w.example, w.created_at AS submittedAt FROM word_entries w INNER JOIN sessions s ON s.id = w.session_id INNER JOIN attendances a ON a.session_id = w.session_id AND a.user_id = w.user_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.starts_at) = #{year} AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM s.starts_at) = #{month} AND a.status in ('ATTENDED', 'LATE') ORDER BY w.created_at ASC ;
